sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18947" key="a)wti/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀωτ-ίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n18947.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cull the choicest</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">best;</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λωτίζομαι.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
